name: security
description: Istio mTLS, OPA/Gatekeeper, Trivy Operator, Falco.
sprintGoal: Establish zero-trust runtime security: Istio mTLS enforced across all namespaces, policy gates via OPA/Gatekeeper, continuous vulnerability scanning via Trivy, and runtime threat detection via Falco.

stories.title: Helm chart: Istio core — base CRDs, istiod, Gateway, STRICT mTLS
stories.description: Create charts/istio/ wrapping istio/base (pin appVersion to 1.21.2) and istio/istiod as subcharts. Deploy a PeerAuthentication in istio-system with mode: STRICT. Create a wildcard Gateway covering *.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/security/.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/istio/Chart.yaml pins appVersion to a specific Istio release (e.g. 1.21.2)
charts/istio/ lists istio/base and istio/istiod as chart dependencies
templates/peer-authentication.yaml creates PeerAuthentication in istio-system with mtls.mode: STRICT
templates/gateway.yaml creates a Gateway covering *.{{ .Values.global.domain }}
helm lint charts/istio/ passes with 0 errors
helm template charts/istio/ | yq e '.' - passes (valid YAML)
argocd-apps/security/istio-app.yaml exists and passes yq e '.' check
stories.testPlan: helm lint; helm template | yq e '.'; yq e '.' argocd-apps/security/istio-app.yaml

smart.notes: Scoped to: base CRDs + istiod + PeerAuthentication + Gateway only. Kiali and tracing moved to 023b.

stories.title: Helm chart: Kiali UI with Keycloak OIDC and Tempo tracing
stories.description: Create charts/kiali/ wrapping kiali/kiali-operator (pin appVersion). Configure Kiali CR with auth.strategy: openid pointing at Keycloak sovereign realm. Configure external_services.tracing.provider: tempo with URL pointing at tempo.monitoring.svc:3100. Ingress for kiali.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/security/kiali-app.yaml.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/kiali/Chart.yaml pins appVersion to a specific Kiali release
Kiali CR spec.auth.strategy is openid
Kiali CR spec.auth.openid.issuer_uri uses {{ .Values.global.keycloak.url }}/realms/sovereign
Kiali CR spec.external_services.tracing.provider is tempo
Ingress or VirtualService exists for kiali.{{ .Values.global.domain }}
helm lint charts/kiali/ passes with 0 errors
argocd-apps/security/kiali-app.yaml exists and passes yq e '.' check
stories.testPlan: helm lint; helm template | grep openid; helm template | grep tempo; yq argocd manifest

smart.notes: Single chart. Each AC is verifiable via helm template grep. Split from 023 per SMART check.

stories.title: Helm chart: OPA/Gatekeeper with 3 ConstraintTemplates
stories.description: Create charts/opa-gatekeeper/ wrapping open-policy-agent/gatekeeper (pin appVersion). Include ConstraintTemplates and Constraints for: (1) no-privilege-escalation, (2) require-resource-limits (cpu+memory), (3) require-labels (app+tier on Deployments). ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/security/opa-gatekeeper-app.yaml.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/opa-gatekeeper/Chart.yaml pins appVersion to a specific Gatekeeper release
templates/ contains 3 ConstraintTemplate resources (one per policy)
templates/ contains 3 corresponding Constraint resources
helm lint charts/opa-gatekeeper/ passes with 0 errors
helm template charts/opa-gatekeeper/ | yq e '.' - passes
helm template charts/opa-gatekeeper/ | grep -c ConstraintTemplate outputs 3
argocd-apps/security/opa-gatekeeper-app.yaml exists and passes yq e '.' check
stories.testPlan: helm lint; helm template | yq e '.'; helm template | grep -c ConstraintTemplate = 3; yq argocd manifest

smart.notes: Single chart, 3 known policies, count verifiable via grep -c. Split from 024 per SMART check.

stories.title: Helm chart: Trivy Operator — cluster-wide vulnerability scanning
stories.description: Create charts/trivy-operator/ wrapping aquasecurity/trivy-operator (pin appVersion). Set targetNamespaces to empty string (scans all namespaces). Enable VulnerabilityReports and ConfigAuditReports. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/security/trivy-operator-app.yaml.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/trivy-operator/Chart.yaml pins appVersion to a specific trivy-operator release
values.yaml sets targetNamespaces: "" (empty = all namespaces)
helm template charts/trivy-operator/ | grep -q 'targetNamespaces' passes
values.yaml enables vulnerabilityReports and configAuditReports
helm lint charts/trivy-operator/ passes with 0 errors
helm template charts/trivy-operator/ | yq e '.' - passes
argocd-apps/security/trivy-operator-app.yaml exists and passes yq e '.' check
stories.testPlan: helm lint; helm template | yq e '.'; helm template | grep targetNamespaces; yq argocd manifest

smart.notes: Single chart. targetNamespaces='' is statically verifiable. Split from 024 per SMART check.

stories.title: Helm chart: Falco runtime threat detection with JSON stdout
stories.description: Create charts/falco/ wrapping falcosecurity/falco (pin appVersion). Enable JSON output to stdout for Loki scraping. Disable the built-in webserver. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/security/falco-app.yaml.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/falco/Chart.yaml pins appVersion to a specific Falco release
values.yaml sets falco.json_output: true
values.yaml sets falco.log_stderr: true
values.yaml disables falco.webserver.enabled (set to false)
helm template charts/falco/ | grep -q 'json_output' passes
helm lint charts/falco/ passes with 0 errors
helm template charts/falco/ | yq e '.' - passes
argocd-apps/security/falco-app.yaml exists and passes yq e '.' check
stories.testPlan: helm lint; helm template | yq e '.'; helm template | grep json_output; yq argocd manifest

smart.notes: Single chart. json_output:true is statically verifiable via grep. Split from 024 per SMART check.
